name: host_type
description: Host type [KVM/ESXi]

name: host_address
description: Host IP address or FQDN

name: datastore
description: Datastore Name

name: vmname
description: VM name

name: ipmode
description: IP Mode: - IP Mode for Device [IPV4/DUAL_STACK]

name: hostname
description: Hostname: (*) - Hostname of Device. (Hostname may only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens. May not begin or end with hyphens.)

name: apptype
description: Appliance Type: - Appliance Type of device.e.g. SBCE, EMS, EMS+SBCE/SingleBox

name: appname
description: Appliance Name

name: nwpass
description: Network Passphrase: - Network Passphrase for Device

name: ems_inst_type
description: EMS Instance Type [none/primary/secondary]: - (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT) EMS Install Type

name: ip0
description: Management IPv4 Address: (*) - The IPv4 address for the management interface.

name: netmask0
description: Netmask: (*) - The IPv4 netmask for the management interface.

name: gateway
description: Default gateway: (*) - The IPv4 gateway for the management interface.

name: ipv6address0
description: IPv6 Address: - (Optional) The IPv6 address for the management interface.

name: ipv6prefix0
description: IPv6 Prefix: - (Optional) The IPv6 prefix for the management interface.

name: ipv6gateway
description: IPv6 Gateway: - (Optional) The IPv6 gateway for the management interface.

name: domain_suffix
description: Domain name

name: first_last_name
description: CN name, usually hostname + domain_suffix (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: organizational_unit
description: Organizational Unit (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: organization
description: Organization (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: locality
description: City or Locality (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: state_province
description: State or Province (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: country
description: Country Code (2 letter code) (NOT FOR SBCE DEPLOYMENT)

name: timezone
description: Time Zone - Time Zone in which device is located

name: ntpservers
description: NTP Server Address: - The IPv4 address for NTP servers.

name: ntpipv6
description: NTP Server Address IPv6: - (For DUAL_STACK Mode Only) The IPv6 address for NTP server.

name: dns
description: DNS Address: - The IPv4 address list for DNS servers.

name: emsip
description: EMS IP Address: (*) - IPv4 address of the EMS System. (Not for Primary EMS and SingleBox deployments.)

name: emsip_v6
description: (Optional)EMS IPv6 Address: - IPv6 address for the EMS System.

name: rootpass
description: Root Password (*) - root password for Device.

name: ipcspass
description: Ipcs Password: (*) - ipcs password for Device.

name: grubpass
description: Grub password: (*) - grub password for Device.

name: net_M1
description: M1 NIC Port-group name

name: net_M2
description: M2 NIC Port-group name

name: net_A1
description: A1 NIC Port-group name

name: net_A2
description: A2 NIC Port-group name

name: net_B1
description: B1 NIC Port-group name

name: net_B2
description: B2 NIC Port-group name

name: ha_peer_node
description: HA Peer SBCE name

name: ha_peer_ip
description: HA Peer SBCE IP
